title: Radiach
description: This hardcore mod adds radiation to all biomes. From the very beginning the player will be accompanied by radiation
body:

---

<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/1DyfCU6RvPs" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>
<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/J-eM_LWrYj4" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>

---

### Radiach is a mod that adds a radiation system to Minecraft, making survival in the world much more difficult and interesting! Now every biome will be exposed to radiation contamination, and only the right gear will help you survive.

---

# 🔬 Main Features:
- **6 levels of radiation** - from light exposure to lethal dose!
- **Protective suits** - from simple clothing to advanced nano-filters.
- **Filters and their wear and tear** - suits have air filters that wear out over time.
- **Status display** - putting on the suit gives you information about radiation and protection status.
- **Full biome contamination table** - know where you should stay out of without protection!


<details>
<summary>Biome list</summary>

|**Biome**|Radiation Level|
|-|-|
|**Nether Wastes**|3|
|**Soul Sand Valley**|4|

### The End:

---

# 🏠 Radiation Resistant Blocks:
To survive in heavily contaminated areas, you can build radiation-resistant blocks that provide shelter from radiation.

---

# 🛡️ Levels of protection:
1. **Regular armor** - weak protection against initial radiation.
2. **Protective suit** - basic protection, but no air filtration.
3. **Suit with Fiber filter** - medium radiation protection.
4. **Suit with Carbon Filter** - withstands stronger contaminated areas.
5. **Nano-suit with carbon filter** - maximum protection, but even it won't save you from level 6!

|Radiation Suit Level|Suit Durability|Filter contamination speed (ticks)|
|-|-|-|
|1|---|---|
|2|200|---|
|3|275|-0.01/4t|
|4|300|-0.01/7t|
|5|600|-0.01/9t|

---

### ☢️ Can you survive in a radiation environment?
Explore, find resources, build protective equipment and fight the invisible threat. But remember: with radiation level 6 you can't escape it...

**🔗 Download and find out if you can survive in your world with Radiach mod!**
